creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Multiple mirrors / sites are dead and/or seemingly abandoned, perhaps it's time to review these sites?

A few examples,

http://www.se.freebsd.org/ -> 404
http://www.fi.freebsd.org/ -> Connection refused
http://www.fr.freebsd.org/ -> Connection refused
http://www.jp.freebsd.org/ -> Seems to be abandoned, lots of dead links
